title: Feature Analysis
description: Compiled analysis of DogStatsD feature parity per config key, produced by analyze-features sub-agents and written to {{tmp}}/feature-analysis.json. Each entry is the result of independent clean-room code analysis of both RefImpl and AdpImpl.

Status.description: Parity verdict from code analysis. 'Unsure' is a last resort when code evidence is genuinely ambiguous.

Description.description: Terse description of what the key controls. Used verbatim in documentation tables.

Notes.description: Short annotation for Divergent or surprising cases. Empty string if not needed.

Discussion.description: Markdown prose for noteworthy features only. Must start with '### key_name'. Null for most keys.
